title: Short Investment Advice for Disposable Income
content: 1. Build an emergency fund first — Save 3–6 months of expenses before investing anything. 2. Start with low-risk options — Fixed deposits (FD), ASB, or EPF voluntary contributions. 3. Diversify — Don't put everything in one place. Mix safe and growth options. 4. Avoid get-rich-quick schemes — If it sounds too good to be true, it probably is. 5. Invest consistently — Even small amounts every month add up over time. 6. Know your risk level — Only invest money you won't need in the short term.
